case_title: FAYE ROBERTS VS. PEET'S COFFEE & TEA, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2014 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO FEB-18-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS CASE AT TODAYS HEARING. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROSALINDA VALDEZ--SR. MANAGER, PARALEGAL. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - STAMPED FROM CT CORP. - SERVED NOV-12-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PEET'S COFFEE & TEA, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, BY DEFENDANT. "DEFENDANT ASSERTS THAT THE 2 YEAR STATUTE HAS RAN AGAINST THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE STATUTE BARS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROSALINDA VALDEZ--SR. MANAGER LEGAL AFFAIR'S. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBERTS, FAYE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ROBERTS, FAYE AS TO DEFENDANT PEET'S COFFEE & TEA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FILED BY DEFENDANT PEET'S COFFEE & TEA, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PEET'S COFFEE & TEA, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBERTS, FAYE AS TO DEFENDANT PEET'S COFFEE & TEA, INC.
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED AND FILED BY DEFENDANT PEET'S COFFEE & TEA, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PEET'S COFFEE & TEA, INC.
